## extractCommands() function

Extract all commands from a yargs instance. Uses yargs internal APIs to introspect registered commands.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function extractCommands(
  yargsInstance: Argv,
  globalFlags: Set<string>,
): ExtractedCommand[]
```
